name: Farhad Ali
title: Political Leader
tagline: Serving the People with Dedication & Integrity
bio: A dedicated public servant committed to the development and welfare of the people. With years of grassroots experience, the mission is to bring meaningful change to every household in the constituency.

achievements.title: Infrastructure Development
achievements.desc: Built 20+ roads and bridges across the constituency improving connectivity for thousands.

achievements.title: Education Initiative
achievements.desc: Established 5 new schools and scholarship programs benefiting 2000+ students annually.

achievements.title: Healthcare Access
achievements.desc: Set up 3 primary health centres providing free medical care to rural communities.

achievements.title: Clean Water Project
achievements.desc: Ensured piped water supply to 150+ villages previously lacking basic water access.

timeline.event: Began community activism in local ward
